name: PCR Protocol
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["PCR Protocol research question"]
    N2["PCR Protocol initiating condition"]
    N3["Core biological components..."]
    N4["Recognition or activation step"]
    N5["Intermediate regulatory state"]
    N6["Committed mechanistic step"]
    N7{"Feedback/checkpoint control"}
    N8["Measured phenotype or product"]
    N9{"Source-grounded check: The MIQE..."}
    N10["PCR Protocol prediction/readout"]

    N1 --> N2
    N2 --> N3
    N3 --> N4
    N4 --> N5
    N5 --> N6
    N6 --> N7
    N7 -->|yes| N8
    N8 --> N9
    N9 -->|yes| N10
    N5 -->|feedback| N3

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N3 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style N4 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N5 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N6 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N7 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N8 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
    style N9 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style N10 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff

flowchartStandard.name: source_grounded_rebuild_v1
flowchartStandard.sourceGrounding: Graph steps are derived from the process title, existing source metadata, and curated process/subfield templates; citations support the process topic and should be reviewed for node-level claims before marking verified.

notes: Corrective rebuild: replaces the generic scaffold with a process-specific step structure and records topology for duplicate detection.

sources.title: The MIQE guidelines: minimum information for publication of quantitative real-time PCR experiments
sources.authors: Bustin, S. A.; Benes, V.; Garson, J. A.; et al.

sources.title: Immunoblotting and immunodetection
sources.authors: Towbin, H.; Staehelin, T.; Gordon, J.
sources.journal: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences

sources.title: Molecular biology of the cell

sources.title: Molecular cell biology
